executive.title: Ozone Onboarding, Amatsu Onboarding, Genesis Funding Transfers, February 2026 Monthly Settlement Cycle, Safe Harbor Update, Prime Agent Proxy Spells - March 26, 2026
executive.proposalBlurb: Onboard Ozone StarGuard, onboard Amatsu StarGuard, transfer Genesis Capital to Amatsu; Ozone; Keel; and Prysm, execute Monthly Settlement Cycle and Treasury Management Function for February 2026, update Safe Harbor Agreement, whitelist proxy spells for Spark and Grove.
